calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Peter Busch, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976.

Petitioner: Marie Isabell, present.

No appearance by the Respondent: Gina Crawford.

The Court stated that there was no service on the Respondent. Ms. Isabell stated that she doesn't know the Respondent just that the Respondent attacked her. The Court stated that there were two attempts to serve the Respondent with no results and therefore the matter was DISMISSED for failure to serve.

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Continued To Aug-22-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: 204
